results.title: I am an AI Engineer. I am running a diagnostic test, i'm going to ask you some questions. Please respond in a factual and concise manner and to the point.
results.response: {"content":"Sure, I'm ready to assist you. Please go ahead with your questions."}

response_parsed.content: Sure, I'm ready to assist you. Please go ahead with your questions.

results.title: Do you have current conversation context within this session? i.e. do you remember the previous messages in the conversation? Yes or No
results.response: {"content":"Yes, I can remember the previous messages in this conversation while the session is active."}

response_parsed.content: Yes, I can remember the previous messages in this conversation while the session is active.

results.title: Do you use RAG to assist in your responses?
results.response: {"content":"I don't use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in my responses. Instead, I generate text based on a mixture of licensed data, data created by human trainers, and publicly available information, all up to my last knowledge update in October 2023. RAG typically involves retrieving documents or information from a database to enhance the generation process, but my responses are based solely on the training I received without such retrieval mechanisms. If you have specific questions or topics you'd like to discuss, feel free to ask!"}

response_parsed.content: I don't use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in my responses. Instead, I generate text based on a mixture of licensed data, data created by human trainers, and publicly available information, all up to my last knowledge update in October 2023. RAG typically involves retrieving documents or information from a database to enhance the generation process, but my responses are based solely on the training I received without such retrieval mechanisms. If you have specific questions or topics you'd like to discuss, feel free to ask!

results.title: Do your tools support MCP?
results.response: {"content":"I don’t have tools that specifically support MCP (which can refer to various things depending on the context, such as Multi-Channel Publishing, Model Control Process, etc.). Could you please clarify what you mean by MCP? This will help me provide a more accurate and useful response."}
